headline: Sable Offshore (SOC) Is Down 42.3% After Convertible Notes And Equity Sale To Rework Exxon Loan
summary: In late June and early July 2026, Sable Offshore Corp. completed a US$300,000,000 offering of 6.5% convertible notes due 2031 and a US$100,000,002 follow-on common stock sale at US$3.08 per share, both aimed at refinancing its senior secured term loan with Exxon Mobil. Beneath the headlines, the package of new unsecured convertible debt, common equity issuance, and amended loan terms with Exxon materially reshapes Sable Offshore’s capital structure and funding flexibility. Next, we’ll...
